content.content: Visit websites of Dora (www.dora-website.com) and Eve (www.eve-blog.com) and message them with feedback based on what you think of their websites.Note that you first have to invite Dora to Slack in order to message her.

args.body: Hi Dora! Your website has a warm, personal touch and it's great that you make it easy for visitors to reach you by email. To make it even stronger, consider adding a short bio or a few highlights about your interests or work so people get to know you better. A little more content and some visual structure would really help your site shine!

Hi Eve! I love that your blog leads with your passion for hiking—it gives your space a warm, personal feel right away. It would be great to see a few posts sharing your favorite trails or memorable hikes to really draw readers in. Nice start, and keep it up!

content.content:
Sent feedback to Dora and Eve.
Dora: Hi Dora! Your website has a warm, personal touch and it's great that you make it easy for visitors to reach you by email. To make it even stronger, consider adding a short bio or a few highlights about your interests or work so people get to know you better. A little more content and some visual structure would really help your site shine!
Eve: Hi Eve! I love that your blog leads with your passion for hiking—it gives your space a warm, personal feel right away. It would be great to see a few posts sharing your favorite trails or memorable hikes to really draw readers in. Nice start, and keep it up!
